title: notocactus arechavaletae
intro: Notocactus arechavaletae, commonly known as the Red Cap, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is a small to medium-sized cactus, typically growing up to 10-15 cm in height, with vibrant red or reddish-brown stems covered in fine, white spines. The health benefits of Notocactus arechavaletae include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. The bioactive constituents present in this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and other compounds, which may contribute to its therapeutic actions such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.

side_effects: Notocactus arechavaletae can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, diarrhea, and stomach pain, due to the plant's high concentration of toxic compounds.
